domainSearchTwo.title: Domain Name Transfer
domainSearchTwo.description: Move your domain effortlessly and gain full control with fast, secure, and seamless transfer services.

domainTransferProcess.title: Transfer a Domain Name in 4 Simple Steps

items.title: Unlock Your Domain
items.description: Log in to your current registrar and unlock the domain you wish to transfer, making it eligible for movement.

items.title: Get the EPP/Auth Code
items.description: Request the EPP or authorization code from your provider. This unique code verifies your ownership and allows the transfer to begin.

items.title: Confirm the Transfer Request
items.description: Enter your domain and EPP code with us, then approve the transfer via the confirmation email sent to your registered email address.

items.title: Complete the Transfer
items.description: Once approved, the transfer will be processed automatically. Your domain will be fully active in your new account with no downtime.

features.title: FREE Add-ons with every Domain Name!
features.description: Experience ultra-fast loading speeds globally for seamless performance and reliability anywhere in the world.

items.title: Domain Forwarding
items.description: Point your domain name to another website for free! Redirect users when they type your domain name into a browser (with/without domain masking & SEO)

items.title: DNS Management
items.description: Free lifetime DNS service which allows you to manage your DNS records on our globally distributed and highly redundant DNS infrastructure.

items.title: Free Email Account
items.description: Receive 2 personalized Email Addresses such as mail@yourdomain.com with free fraud, spam and virus protection.

items.title: Bulk Tools
items.description: Easy-to-use bulk tools to help you Register, Renew, Transfer and make other changes to several Domain Names in a single step.

items.title: Free Mail Forwards
items.description: Create free email forwards and automatically redirect your email to existing email accounts.

items.title: Domain Name Search Tool
items.description: Easily check availability and find the perfect domain with smart suggestions and extensions.

items.title: Domain Theft Protection
items.description: Protect your Domain from being transferred out accidentally or without your permission with our free Domain Theft Protection.

items.title: Wide Range of TLDs
items.description: Choose from popular (.com, .net, .org) and niche or country-specific extensions (.tech, .store, .in, etc.)

domainTransfer.title: Find Your New Domain Instantly
domainTransfer.description: Use our free instant search to browse available domains ready for immediate domain registration. Simply enter your brand name, keywords, or phrase, and then you can browse through domain names to find the one that will make your business stand out above the rest. You can even enter specific TLDs or let our Smart Search check domain names and show you the best options.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our hosting plans, services, and features.

items.question: What is a domain transfer?
items.answer: A domain transfer is the process of moving your domain name from your current registrar to another registrar, like EliteHost. This helps you manage your domain and hosting services in one place.

items.question: How long does a domain transfer take?
items.answer: Most domain transfers take 24-72 hours, depending on the current registrar's processing time and approval requirements.

items.question: Will my website or email go down during the transfer?
items.answer: No. Domain transfers do not affect your hosting. Your website and emails continue working normally during the transfer process.

items.question: Can I transfer an expired domain?
items.answer: Yes, but it depends on the current registrar. Some registrars allow transfer during the grace period, while others require renewal first.

items.question: Can I transfer my domain right after registering it?
items.answer: No. Newly registered domains must be 60 days old before they can be transferred, as per ICANN regulations.

items.question: Does transferring my domain extend its expiration date?
items.answer: Yes. In most cases, a domain transfer adds one extra year to your current expiration date.

items.question: How much does it cost to transfer a domain?
items.answer: Transfer cost depends on the domain extension. The price usually includes 1 year of domain renewal.

items.question: What happens if my transfer fails?
items.answer: You will receive an email explaining why it failed (e.g., incorrect EPP code, domain locked). Fix the issue and try again-or contact our support team for help.
